name: Community West Bancshares
business: Community West Bancshares is a bank holding company whose primary business is providing banking services, including loans and deposits, to individuals and businesses in California. Its operations are concentrated in Fresno, Kern, Madera, Merced, Placer, Sacramento, San Joaquin, San Luis Obispo, Santa Barbara, Stanislaus, Tulare, and Ventura Counties. The company's results depend on general economic trends and the residential and commercial real estate markets in its market area.

exposures.sentence: Risks and exposures related to cybersecurity attacks are expected to remain high for the foreseeable future due to the rapidly evolving nature and sophistication of these threats, as well as due to the expanding use of Internet banking, mobile banking and other technology based products and services by us and our customers.
